meaning: adj.声音尖锐的,喜欢尖声喊叫的
examples: His voice was suddenly high and screechy.
An hour later another song, loud and screechy, filled the room.
However, although one of my neighbors is beefy and weighs 120kg, his voice is high and screechy, just like the one from a guy half his size.
But why the hackneyed shots of screechy cheerleaders, bench-resting halfbacks and literal clowns in the stands mugging like eight-year-olds?
